---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Akashi
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Open VS Code with Akashi installed
2. Go to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS:** [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04, Windows 11]
- **VS Code version:** [e.g., 1.96.0]
- **Akashi version:** [e.g., 1.0.11]
- **AI tools in use:** [e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI]

## Domain (if known)

Which part of Akashi is affected?

- [ ] Sources (rule indexing, tree view)
- [ ] Graph (D3 visualization)
- [ ] Addons (marketplace, installation)
- [ ] Pulse (session analytics, dashboard)
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Config / Settings
- [ ] Other

## Additional context

Add any other context about the problem here. Include relevant log output from
**Output > Akashi** panel if available.
